headline: Uber (UBER) Tightens Lawsuit Terms As Drivers Protest AI Pay Cuts
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) has introduced new contract provisions that require plaintiffs to disclose third party litigation funding arrangements in lawsuits against the company. At the same time, rideshare drivers are organizing protests in response to rapid automation efforts and reports of AI driven pay cuts. These developments are reshaping Uber's legal posture and raising fresh questions about the future role of human drivers on the platform. Uber Technologies sits at the center of...
